title: oleandra nitida
intro: Oleandra nitida, also known as the elephant ear fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Blechnaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oleandra nitida include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory issues. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or decoction, and in some cultures, it is also used as a poultice to treat skin conditions.
